name: What happens if AI wrongly says my firm lost a case?

mainEntity.name: What happens if AI wrongly says my firm lost a case?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Sue for defamation if false and damaging; prove malice/negligence.**[1] **Key factors:** 1. Retract demand first. 2. NY AI rules emerging.[10] **Document, notify, litigate if persists.**[1] Outcomes vary.[1]
